author: Haroen Viaene
subject: v6.1.0
body:
# [6.1.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v6.0.0...v6.1.0) (2019-12-17)

### Bug Fixes

* **connectNumericMenu:** support numeric refinement 0 ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2882](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2882)) ([f4c0dc4](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/f4c0dc4))
* **deps:** update dependency next to v9.1.1 ([144b976](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/144b976))
* **helper:** rely on stable version of algoliasearch-helper ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2871](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2871)) ([3548816](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/3548816))

### Features

* **insights:** show an error when 'clickAnalytics: true' is missing. ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2877](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2877)) ([a74d13d](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/a74d13d))
* **voice:** add additionalQueryParameters ([algolia/react-instantsearch#2366](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/2366)) ([6fc0b57](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/6fc0b57))
